user.title: Connect to Sendspin BT Bridge
user.description: Enter the bridge's host, port, and a long-lived bearer token (generate one in the bridge web UI under Settings → Home Assistant).

pair.title: Sendspin BT Bridge discovered at {host}:{port}
pair.description: Paste a long-lived bearer token from the bridge web UI (Settings → Home Assistant → Generate token).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Sendspin BT Bridge
reauth_confirm.description: Your bearer token was rejected. Generate a fresh one in the bridge web UI and paste it here.

error.auth_failed: Token rejected — make sure it was just minted and not revoked.

abort.missing_host_id: Bridge mDNS advertisement is missing the host_id TXT record.
